title: Lirianthe nana
taxonomy: Lirianthe nana is a genus in the family Liriantheceae, but it is now considered to be part of the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales, which is a part of the larger clade asterids. The class to which Lirianthe nana belongs is Magnoliopsida, commonly referred to as flowering plants. It is also classified under the division Magnoliophyta. This classification reflects its botanical and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
